parameters.name: comparator
parameters.label: Comparator
parameters.description: Select the operation to compare the Threshold parameter to.

parameters.name: rgb
parameters.label: RGB
parameters.description: Determines which part of the image used to calculate threshold. This parameter determines the output for the R, G, and B channels.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.label: Threshold
parameters.description: Using the function selected in the Comparator parameter, any pixel that satisfies this value will be set to 0. For example, if Comparator = Less then any pixel less than this Threshold value will be s

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.label: Alpha
parameters.description: This parameter determines the output for the alpha channel.

parameters.name: soften
parameters.label: Soften
parameters.description: The rate of falloff at the threshold value. As this value set set larger, pixels near the threshold value will be set to something between 0-1.
